title: sedum annuum subsp. annuum
intro: Sedum annuum subsp. annuum is a species of succulent plant, commonly known as wild aloe or annual sedum, belonging to the Crassulaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to its high concentration of sesquiterpenes and flavonoids. The health benefits of Sedum annuum subsp. annuum include its potential to treat skin conditions, wounds, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and salves, which are often used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
